channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: PM Warns Against Corruption and Embezzlement in Public Projects
item.description: During his working visit to Rukwa Region, Prime Minister Dr Mwigulu Nchemba warned all public officials that the government will not allow any laziness, corruption, or embezzlement that delay developm...

item.title: Government Forms Panel to Address LPG Supply Issues, Boosts Production by 10%
item.description: The Central Government has constituted a three-member committee to tackle the ongoing LPG shortage which has been impacting the hospitality sector significantly. The shortage follows concerns arising ...

item.title: Judges play critical role in promoting fair market practices and protecting consumers in Nigeria
item.description: Na Abuja, regulators don yan say courts get big role to play for Nigeria market matter. Tunji Bello, wey be Executive Vice-Chairman and CEO of the Federal Competition and Consumer Protection Commissio...

item.title: ENHYPEN's Heeseung Departs Group to Pursue Solo Career Under BELIFT LAB
item.description: On March 10, 2026, BELIFT LAB, the agency managing ENHYPEN, officially announced that member Heeseung will be parting ways with the popular K-pop boy group. This decision came after thorough discussio...

item.title: Sub-Saharan Africa faces economic strain from rising oil prices amid Middle East conflict
item.description: Sub-Saharan Africa is feeling the pinch as rising global oil prices, spurred by escalating tensions in the Middle East, put economic pressure on the region. The assassination of Iran's Supreme Leader,...

item.title: Channel 4 Remakes Iconic TV Drama A Woman of Substance
item.description: Channel 4 has remade Barbara Taylor Bradford’s iconic novel adaptation, A Woman of Substance, more than 40 years after its original 1985 miniseries, which remains one of the broadcaster’s highest-rate...

item.title: Macquarie highlights potential mortgage risks from AI-driven employment changes
item.description: Macquarie Bank has issued a cautionary note regarding the potential impact of artificial intelligence on the Australian economy and the banking sector. The bank points out that while Australia's econo...

item.title: Markets and Oil Prices Moderate Amid Uncertainty Over Iran Conflict
item.description: U.S. stock index futures remained largely stable on Tuesday, as investors reacted to statements from former U.S. President Donald Trump suggesting that the conflict involving Iran and Israel might be ...

item.title: Heart Evangelista Recognized for Influence at Paris Fashion Week Fall/Winter 2026
item.description: Heart Evangelista, the renowned Filipino actress, artist, and fashion icon, has been officially recognized as one of the influential personalities at the Paris Fashion Week Fall/Winter 2026. Known for...

item.title: Pakistan Courts Implement Four-Day Work Week Amid Fuel Shortages
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Pakistan’s courts have announced a shift to four-day work weeks, from Monday to Thursday, as part of a broader austerity plan due to rising energy costs linked to the Middle East conflict. ...

item.title: Lagos State Launches Investigation into Ogba Four-Storey School Building Collapse with No Fatalities Reported
item.description: The Lagos State Government has commenced a thorough investigation into the collapse of a four-storey building in the Aguda area of Ogba, Lagos, which housed Yemco Nursery, Primary and Comprehensive Co...

item.title: Indian restaurants face closure as cooking gas shortage hits amid Iran conflict
item.description: Restaurants and hotels across India are now struggling big time because cooking gas is running low, thanks to the war involving Iran. The US-Israel attacks have stopped shipping traffic in the Gulf an...

item.title: Farotimi Advises Strong Security Measures For Omokri As Nigeria Appoints Him Ambassador To Mexico
item.description: Lawyer and public commentator, Dele Farotimi, don yan as e concern the new diplomatic posting of Reno Omokri to Mexico as Nigeria's ambassador. For interview with The Citizenship Project, Farotimi tal...

item.title: Supreme Court suggests Parliament should handle reforms in Muslim inheritance laws rather than judicial intervention
item.description: On March 10, 2026, the Supreme Court of India expressed that it would be prudent to allow Parliament to implement the Uniform Civil Code (UCC) rather than judicially annul the Shariat Application Act ...

item.title: IFP focuses on local employment in KwaMashu by addressing illegal foreign nationals
item.description: The Inkatha Freedom Party (IFP) in eThekwini District has intensified its programme addressing illegal foreign nationals, moving its focus from the Durban CBD to townships where poverty is most severe...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Offers Condolences and Reaffirms Pakistan-Iran Cooperation
item.description: On Tuesday, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif sent a formal letter to Iran’s newly appointed Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, congratulating him on assuming the role following the assassination of his fa...

item.title: Malawi’s digital health records cut HIV deaths and improve patient care
item.description: In Malawi, one of the countries hardest hit by HIV, a simple but effective innovation has significantly improved patient outcomes: a digital medical records system. About 7% of Malawians live with HIV...

item.title: Nigerian Army Detains Major After He Withdrew Troops to Protect Soldiers
item.description: Major Shamsudeen Sani, wey don spend years dey fight Boko Haram and ISWAP for northeastern Nigeria, don dey detained by Nigerian Army for Maiduguri for months. Dem put am for solitary confinement afte...

item.title: Australian Fintech Founder Targets US Cryptocurrency Payments Market
item.description: Raagulan Pathy, a 45-year-old Australian entrepreneur originally from Adelaide, is emerging as a leading figure in the country's fintech scene. Splitting his time between the Gold Coast and Singapore,...

item.title: Trump's Response to Iran Conflict Reveals Limits to Economic Pain Tolerance, Offering Insights for China's Taiwan Strategy
item.description: In the wake of the recent U.S.-led military campaign against Iran, which involved intense strikes degrading Iran's naval, air, and missile capabilities while disrupting shipping through the Strait of ...
